title: Cockpit Status Envelope (phase-grouped)
description: Single-line JSON envelope emitted by `generacy cockpit status --json <epic-ref>`. Backward-compatible superset of the pre-#828 envelope: adds `rows[].phase`. Row identity is (repo, number, phase).

rows.description: One entry per (issue × phase membership). Order: outer key = ParsedPhase body order; inner key = ParsedPhase.refs body order; trailing `phase: null` group last. Total length MAY exceed the count of distinct (repo, number) pairs when refs appear under multiple phases (FR-006).

kind.description: Classification of the item. `pr` when the item URL matches `/pull/\d+` or carries the `type:pr` label.

sourceLabel.description: The label the classifier used to pick this state — e.g. `phase:plan`.

prNumber.description: The PR number (either the row's own number when kind=pr, or the resolved PR for an issue). `null` when no PR is linked.

checks.description: Rollup of check-run conclusions for the linked PR. `none` when no PR or when the API call failed (non-fatal).

url.description: The GitHub URL for the issue or PR.

oneOf.description: ParsedPhase.token — lowercased first token of the `### <phase>` heading in the epic body.

phase.description: Phase membership from ParsedEpicBody.phases. `null` when the ref appears in ParsedEpicBody.allRefs but under no phase heading, or the epic has zero phases. Refs under multiple phase headings emit one row per phase membership; row count MAY exceed allRefs.length.
